results.title: Tesla (TSLA) Q1 2026 Earnings - Date, Expectations, Key Watchpoints
Tesla (TSLA) Q1 2026 earnings preview: the growth story is dead | Electrek

summary: Q1 2026 earnings already reported April 22, 2026: EPS $0.41 (beat estimate of $0.33), revenue ~$21.4B (slight miss). Next earnings (Q2 2026) expected ~July 22, 2026 after market close. Q2 consensus estimates not yet firmly set.
